/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC    -Wall -Wextra -ffast-math -fopenmp -std=c++17 -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -msse2 -msse3 -mssse3 -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libvisp_ar.so.3.7 -o ../../lib/libvisp_ar.so.3.7.1 CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/coin-simulator/vpAR.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/coin-simulator/vpSimulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/coin-simulator/vpViewer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/ogre-simulator/vpAROgre.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/panda3d-simulator/vpPanda3DBaseRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/panda3d-simulator/vpPanda3DCommonFilters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/panda3d-simulator/vpPanda3DFrameworkManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/panda3d-simulator/vpPanda3DGeometryRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/panda3d-simulator/vpPanda3DPostProcessFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/panda3d-simulator/vpPanda3DRGBRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/panda3d-simulator/vpPanda3DRenderParameters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/panda3d-simulator/vpPanda3DRendererSet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/visp_ar.dir/src/vpSimulatorException.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/nguyen/visp-ws/visp/3rdparty/lib: ../../lib/libvisp_core.so.3.7.1 -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnsl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblapack.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcblas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libatlas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so
